topIngredients.name: Hadasei-3 Complex (Algae, Rice, Oat)
topIngredients.benefit: Japanese botanical trio that balances oil production

topIngredients.name: Saccharomyces Ferment
topIngredients.benefit: Fermented ingredient that refines pores and texture

topIngredients.name: Hyaluronic Acid
topIngredients.benefit: Lightweight hydration under a matte finish

verdict: Tatcha Water Cream is a masterclass in mattifying hydration. The fermented rice complex actively controls oil while Japanese botanicals balance the complexion. The best luxury pick for oily and combination skin types.
